note: Nominal CAD. These are deterministic engine outputs for external-tool validation, not financial advice.

diy-couple.label: DIY couple, both working
diy-couple.subtitle: Mid-50s, no DB pension, staggered retirement at 62 / 65

db-pension-couple.label: Public-sector couple with DB pensions
db-pension-couple.subtitle: Late-50s nurse + teacher (HOOPP / OTPP), retiring at 60

public-comparator-single.label: Public comparator single
public-comparator-single.subtitle: Solo 65-year-old, flat $33K spending, RRSP/TFSA only, CPP+OAS at 65

retired-traditional.label: Already retired (traditional)
retired-traditional.subtitle: Couple aged 68 / 65, drawing CPP+OAS, RRIF in motion

fire-couple.label: FIRE couple, retired early
fire-couple.subtitle: Mid-40s already retired, large non-reg, RRSP meltdown candidate
